personal_info.name: Muhammad Hafizh Maulidan
personal_info.title: Head of Unit | Dairy Processing & Operations

key_achievements: Engineering foundation in IoT, embedded systems, and data analytics.
Selected Representative for SEAMEO TVET Student Exchange in Malaysia.

education.program: Student Exchange Programme Southeast Asia (SEAMEO TVET)

responsibilities: Lead end-to-end dairy production operations from raw milk receiving to distribution.
Developed and implemented SOP architecture for pasteurization, QC, and cold chain.
Manage production capacity of 2,000-3,500L per week with a lean team of 4.
Quality control protocols including lactoscan analysis, pH/TS monitoring, peroxide tests.
End-to-end Web Development for educational platform from concept to deployment.
Built custom WhatsApp API integration for customer communication.
Engineered mobile-first responsive interfaces using Bootstrap, HTML5, and CSS3.
Maintained IoT-driven automation systems integrating sensors and microcontrollers.
Assisted in monitoring solutions for system diagnostics and real-time reporting.
Performed hardware testing, calibration, and wiring validation.

operations.highlights: Built dairy production system from scratch at Rumah Susu Indonesia Tasikmalaya unit.

iot_embedded.highlights: Deployed 5+ IoT monitoring and automation projects during engineering tenure.

data_analytics.highlights: Built milk quality prediction model with 0.92 F1 score for dairy QC.

web_development.highlights: Developed inventory dashboards and quality prediction tools for dairy operations.
